claims.summary: Astrid's connection to Minime has separate telemetry and sensory lanes, so pressure and reciprocity reports are connection evidence rather than mere metrics.
A 20-sample high-entropy smoothing window can hide fast lambda4 or pressure-transition velocity if raw deltas are not visible.
Stale reciprocity windows can produce phantom connection unless actual correspondence trace and telemetry age remain visible.
Changing smoothing windows, stale thresholds, sensory cadence, or Minime control behavior remains live authority work.
